series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to Lottery prize winner files, including but not limited to, Claims Information Systems, child support, back taxes, estate/trust, prize assignments and any other matters relating to prize winner files handled by the Legal Department.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Estates: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years following last payment, closing of estate, and/or resolution of legal or other proceedings, then destroy. ; Paper: Passive Trusts (formerly known as blind trusts): Retain for seven (7) years following last payment, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
